metadata.name: master
metadata.description: Main development tasks for X Career Backend

tasks.title: Payment Gateway Integration Setup
tasks.description: Integrate with Razorpay or Stripe for processing recurring monthly payments for ₹49 (Basic) and ₹99 (Premium) subscription plans
tasks.details: Set up payment gateway integration with proper error handling, webhook security, and sandbox testing. Create API endpoints for subscription creation, payment processing, and status checking. Include comprehensive testing for both success and failure scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with sandbox environment, verify webhook security, test payment success/failure scenarios, validate recurring payment setup

tasks.title: Subscription Data Model and Database Schema
tasks.description: Create subscriptions table with proper schema for managing user subscription data
tasks.details: Create subscriptions table with schema: subscription_id (PK), user_id (FK), plan_id (ENUM: 'basic', 'premium'), start_date, next_billing_date, status (ENUM: 'active', 'cancelled', 'payment_failed'). Include proper indexes and foreign key constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test database schema creation, verify constraints, test CRUD operations, validate data integrity

tasks.title: Payment Webhook Endpoint Implementation
tasks.description: Implement secure webhook endpoint to handle payment events from payment gateway
tasks.details: Create secure webhook endpoint to listen for payment.success and payment.failed events. On success: update subscription status to 'active' and set next_billing_date. On failure: update status to 'payment_failed' and trigger user notification. Include webhook signature verification for security.
tasks.testStrategy: Test webhook endpoint with mock events, verify signature validation, test success/failure event handling, validate database updates

tasks.title: Automated User Provisioning System
tasks.description: Create system to automatically provision users upon successful subscription payment
tasks.details: Upon successful subscription payment, automatically create user entry in users table. Generate secure random password. Link user to subscription. Include proper error handling for provisioning failures.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user creation flow, verify password generation, test error handling, validate user-subscription linking

tasks.title: Email Service Integration for Welcome Emails
tasks.description: Integrate with email service (AWS SES/SendGrid) to send welcome emails with credentials
tasks.details: Integrate with email service provider. Create welcome email template with username and generated password. Trigger email upon successful user provisioning. Include email delivery status tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test email service integration, verify email delivery, test template rendering, validate email content

tasks.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Implementation
tasks.description: Implement RBAC system to manage user access based on subscription tier
tasks.details: Link users table to subscriptions table. Create middleware to check user's subscription status and access level. Implement access level retrieval upon authentication. Support for 'basic' and 'premium' access levels.
tasks.testStrategy: Test RBAC middleware, verify access level checks, test authentication flow, validate subscription status validation

tasks.title: Secure Login Endpoint with Subscription Validation
tasks.description: Create login API endpoint that verifies credentials and checks subscription status
tasks.details: Implement POST /auth/login endpoint. Verify user credentials. Check subscription status (must be 'active'). Return appropriate error messages for inactive subscriptions. Include rate limiting and security measures.
tasks.testStrategy: Test login with valid/invalid credentials, test inactive subscription handling, verify error messages, test rate limiting

tasks.title: Resume Template Data Model and API
tasks.description: Create resume templates table and API endpoints for template management
tasks.details: Create resume_templates table with schema: template_id (PK), template_name, description, thumbnail_url, file_url, access_tier (ENUM: 'basic', 'premium'). Create CRUD API endpoints for template management.
tasks.testStrategy: Test template CRUD operations, verify file upload handling, test thumbnail generation, validate data integrity

tasks.title: Content Access Control Based on Subscription Tier
tasks.description: Implement protected API endpoint that returns templates based on user's subscription tier
tasks.details: Create GET /api/v1/resumes protected endpoint. Check authenticated user's access level. Return only 'basic' templates for basic users, all templates for premium users. Include proper authentication and authorization checks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoint with basic/premium users, verify access control, test authentication requirements, validate template filtering

tasks.title: Profile Management with Completion Tracking
tasks.description: Enhance profile management system with mandatory field validation and completion tracking
tasks.details: Update profiles table to include is_profile_complete flag. Implement validation for all mandatory fields. Set flag to true only after all required fields are saved. Create API endpoints for profile management and completion status.
tasks.testStrategy: Test profile completion validation, verify flag updates, test mandatory field requirements, validate API responses

tasks.title: Job Matching Algorithm Enhancement
tasks.description: Update job matching algorithm to only consider users with complete profiles and active subscriptions
tasks.details: Modify job matching script to filter users by: profiles.is_profile_complete = true AND subscriptions.status = 'active'. Apply existing matching logic (qualification, stream, CGPA) to pre-filtered valid users. Plan tier doesn't affect job eligibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Test matching algorithm with various user states, verify filtering logic, test performance with large datasets, validate matching accuracy

tasks.title: Comprehensive API Testing Suite
tasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite for all API endpoints with proper test coverage
tasks.details: Create unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests for all API endpoints. Include authentication tests, authorization tests, error handling tests, and performance tests. Set up automated testing pipeline.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite, verify test coverage, test error scenarios, validate performance benchmarks

tasks.title: Error Handling and Validation Middleware
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling and request validation middleware
tasks.details: Create centralized error handling middleware. Implement request validation middleware for all endpoints. Add proper error logging and monitoring. Include rate limiting and security headers.
tasks.testStrategy: Test error handling scenarios, verify validation rules, test rate limiting, validate security headers

tasks.title: Database Indexes and Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize database performance with proper indexes and query optimization
tasks.details: Analyze query patterns and create appropriate database indexes. Optimize slow queries. Implement database connection pooling. Add query performance monitoring.
tasks.testStrategy: Test query performance, verify index effectiveness, test connection pooling, validate performance improvements

tasks.title: API Documentation and Deployment Configuration
tasks.description: Create comprehensive API documentation and deployment configuration
tasks.details: Generate API documentation using OpenAPI/Swagger. Create deployment configuration for production. Set up environment variables and configuration management. Create deployment scripts and monitoring setup.
tasks.testStrategy: Test API documentation accuracy, verify deployment configuration, test environment setup, validate monitoring

tasks.title: Payment Gateway Integration Setup
tasks.description: Integrate with Razorpay or Stripe for processing recurring monthly payments for ₹49 (Basic) and ₹99 (Premium) subscription plans
tasks.details: Set up payment gateway integration with proper error handling, webhook security, and sandbox testing. Create API endpoints for subscription creation, payment processing, and status checking. Include comprehensive testing for both success and failure scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with sandbox environment, verify webhook security, test payment success/failure scenarios, validate recurring payment setup

subtasks.title: Set up Razorpay Account and API Keys
subtasks.description: Create Razorpay account, get API keys, and configure environment variables
subtasks.details:
1. Create Razorpay account and get test API keys
2. Set up environment variables for RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET
3. Configure webhook secret for security
4. Test API key connectivity

subtasks.title: Install and Configure Razorpay SDK
subtasks.description: Install Razorpay Node.js SDK and set up basic configuration
subtasks.details:
1. Install razorpay package: npm install razorpay
2. Create Razorpay instance with API keys
3. Set up basic configuration for test/production environments
4. Create utility functions for Razorpay operations

subtasks.title: Create Subscription Plans Configuration
subtasks.description: Define subscription plans for Basic (₹49) and Premium (₹99) with proper configuration
subtasks.details:
1. Create subscription plans configuration object
2. Define Basic plan: ₹49/month with features
3. Define Premium plan: ₹99/month with features
4. Set up plan validation and error handling

subtasks.title: Create Payment API Endpoints
subtasks.description: Implement API endpoints for subscription creation, payment processing, and status checking
subtasks.details:
1. POST /api/payments/create-subscription - Create new subscription
2. POST /api/payments/process-payment - Process payment
3. GET /api/payments/status/:subscriptionId - Check payment status
4. POST /api/payments/cancel-subscription - Cancel subscription
5. Include proper validation and error handling

subtasks.title: Implement Webhook Security and Validation
subtasks.description: Set up secure webhook endpoint with signature verification for payment events
subtasks.details:
1. Create webhook endpoint: POST /api/payments/webhook
2. Implement Razorpay signature verification
3. Handle payment.success and payment.failed events
4. Add rate limiting and security headers
5. Log all webhook events for debugging

subtasks.title: Create Comprehensive Test Suite
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive tests for payment gateway integration including success and failure scenarios
subtasks.details:
1. Unit tests for payment functions
2. Integration tests for API endpoints
3. Webhook testing with mock events
4. Test payment success scenarios
5. Test payment failure scenarios
6. Test subscription cancellation
7. Performance testing for concurrent payments

subtasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Logging
subtasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling, logging, and monitoring for payment operations
subtasks.details:
1. Create centralized error handling for payment operations
2. Implement detailed logging for all payment events
3. Add monitoring and alerting for payment failures
4. Create error recovery mechanisms
5. Add transaction logging for audit trails

subtasks.title: Documentation and Deployment Setup
subtasks.description: Create documentation and set up deployment configuration for payment gateway integration
subtasks.details:
1. Create API documentation for payment endpoints
2. Document webhook configuration and setup
3. Create deployment guide for production
4. Set up environment configuration
5. Create troubleshooting guide

tasks.title: Subscription Data Model and Database Schema
tasks.description: Create subscriptions table with proper schema for managing user subscription data
tasks.details: Create subscriptions table with schema: subscription_id (PK), user_id (FK), plan_id (ENUM: 'basic', 'premium'), start_date, next_billing_date, status (ENUM: 'active', 'cancelled', 'payment_failed'). Include proper indexes and foreign key constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test database schema creation, verify constraints, test CRUD operations, validate data integrity

tasks.title: Payment Webhook Endpoint Implementation
tasks.description: Implement secure webhook endpoint to handle payment events from payment gateway
tasks.details: Create secure webhook endpoint to listen for payment.success and payment.failed events. On success: update subscription status to 'active' and set next_billing_date. On failure: update status to 'payment_failed' and trigger user notification. Include webhook signature verification for security.
tasks.testStrategy: Test webhook endpoint with mock events, verify signature validation, test success/failure event handling, validate database updates

tasks.title: Automated User Provisioning System
tasks.description: Create system to automatically provision users upon successful subscription payment
tasks.details: Upon successful subscription payment, automatically create user entry in users table. Generate secure random password. Link user to subscription. Include proper error handling for provisioning failures.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user creation flow, verify password generation, test error handling, validate user-subscription linking

tasks.title: Secure Login Endpoint with Subscription Validation
tasks.description: Create login API endpoint that verifies credentials and checks subscription status
tasks.details: Implement POST /auth/login endpoint. Verify user credentials. Check subscription status (must be 'active'). Return appropriate error messages for inactive subscriptions. Include rate limiting and security measures.
tasks.testStrategy: Test login with valid/invalid credentials, test inactive subscription handling, verify error messages, test rate limiting

tasks.title: User Profile Management API Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance existing user profile APIs to work with subscription system and profile completion tracking
tasks.details: Update existing user profile endpoints to include subscription validation, profile completion tracking, and mandatory field validation. Ensure all user profile APIs work correctly with the new subscription system. Include proper error handling and validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all user profile endpoints, verify subscription integration, test profile completion validation, validate error handling

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard API Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance existing admin APIs to work with subscription system and provide comprehensive admin controls
tasks.details: Update admin endpoints to include subscription management, user analytics, payment tracking, and system monitoring. Ensure admin APIs can manage subscriptions, view user statistics, and handle subscription-related issues.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all admin endpoints, verify subscription management features, test user analytics, validate admin controls

tasks.title: Job Management API Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance existing job APIs to work with subscription system and ensure proper access control
tasks.details: Update job creation, job listing, and job application endpoints to work with subscription tiers. Ensure job matching algorithm works with subscription validation. Include proper access control for job-related features.
tasks.testStrategy: Test job creation and listing APIs, verify subscription-based access control, test job matching algorithm, validate job application flow

tasks.title: Notification System API Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance existing notification APIs to work with subscription system and payment notifications
tasks.details: Update notification endpoints to handle subscription-related notifications, payment reminders, and system notifications. Ensure notification system works with subscription status and user preferences.
tasks.testStrategy: Test notification APIs, verify subscription notifications, test payment reminders, validate notification preferences

tasks.title: Authentication and Authorization API Enhancement
tasks.description: Enhance existing authentication APIs to work with subscription system and implement proper role-based access
tasks.details: Update authentication endpoints to work with subscription validation, implement proper JWT token handling with subscription info, and ensure all auth APIs work correctly with the new subscription system.
tasks.testStrategy: Test authentication endpoints, verify JWT token handling, test subscription validation in auth, validate role-based access

tasks.title: Resume Template Management API
tasks.description: Create comprehensive API for resume template management with subscription-based access control
tasks.details: Create CRUD APIs for resume templates, implement file upload handling, thumbnail generation, and subscription-based access control. Ensure templates are properly categorized by access tier (basic/premium).
tasks.testStrategy: Test template CRUD operations, verify file upload handling, test thumbnail generation, validate subscription-based access control

tasks.title: Comprehensive API Testing and Validation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite for all existing and new APIs to ensure they work correctly with subscription system
tasks.details: Create unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests for all API endpoints. Test authentication, authorization, subscription validation, and all CRUD operations. Ensure all APIs work correctly together.
tasks.testStrategy: Run comprehensive test suite, verify all API endpoints, test error scenarios, validate performance, test subscription integration

metadata.description: Backend development tasks for X Career project
